case_title: BARBARA DOBARD VS. SPORTS CLUB/LA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF DOBARD, BARBARA

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS WRITTEN DISCOVERY RESPONSES (TRANSACTION ID # 58118893) FILED BY DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS CLUB/LA, ( ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS SPORTS CLUB/LA, ALSO KNOWN AS EQUINOX SPORTS CLUB, ET AL.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 58258748) FILED BY DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS CLUB/LA, ( ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS SPORTS CLUB/LA, ALSO KNOWN AS EQUINOX SPORTS CLUB, ET AL.

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS' MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS FOR PLAINTIFFS FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT ORDER - DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF WAS ORDERED ON DECEMBER 7, 2015 TO PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT REQUEST. IN RESPONSE SHE APPARENTLY SERVED A VERIFIED RESPONSE SOLELY TO FORM INTERROGATORIES. WHILE THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED, PLAINTIFF SHALL BE GIVEN ONE FURTHER OPPORTUNITY TO FULLY COMPLY WITH THE DECEMBER 7, 2015 ORDER AND TO SERVE COMPLETE RESPONSES TO ALL REFERENCED DISCOVERY. SERVICE IS THE RESPONSE IS REQUIRED WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE HEARING HEREIN. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY DEFENDANT MAY REFILE ITS MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO THE DEFENDANT IN THE SUM OF $659 TO BE PAID WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER( SEE ORDER FOR COMPLETE DETAILS). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED AND FOR SANCTIONS - MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND TO RECOVER MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $659 IS GRANTED AND WAS UNOPPOSED. SANCTIONS SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. THE COURT'S PREVIOUS ORDER DATED DECEMBER 7, 2015 SEEKING THE SAME RELIEF PROVIDED PLAINTIFF WITH 30 DAYS TO PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES TO THE SUBJECT REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND SHE FAILED TO DO SO. SAID ORDER FURTHER ADVISED THE PLAINTIFF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE DECEMBER 7,2015 ORDER WOULD RESULT IN GRANTING OF THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAR-28-2016 IN DEPT. 502 COURT DENIES PLAINTIFF'S LAST MINUTE REQUEST FOR TRIAL CONTINUANCE.PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO PRODUCE ANY WITNESSES, AN ORDER GRANTING MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED HAVING BEEN FILED ON FEBRUARY 9, 2016, THE COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT AND WILL GRANT DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR NON SUIT AND WILL ENTER JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS' RENEWED MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS FOR PLAINTIFFS FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE VERIFICATIONS TO OUTSTANDING DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO PRODUCTION BY MARCH 18. DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS LIFTED FOR TAKING THE PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION ONLY. FIVE (5) DAYS NOTICE TO BE GIVEN FOR TAKING THE DEPOSITION BY WAY OF E-MAIL. MONETARY SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $715.00. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Text Ruling

Renewed Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Court Order
Off Calendar Mar-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - BARBARA DOBARD, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. STACEY CHAU OF THE KRONBERG LAW, TEL. NO. 1-510-254-6750 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS' Renewed Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Court Order is granted in part. Plaintiff to provide verifications to outstanding discovery responses and complete responses to Production by March 18. Discovery cutoff is lifted for taking the Plaintiff's deposition only. Five (5) days notice to be given for taking the deposition by way of e-mail. Monetary sanction in the amount of $715.00. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Pro-tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Court Order
Off Calendar Feb-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - BARBARA DOBARD, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. STACEY CHAU OF THE KRONBERG LAW, TEL. NO. 1-510-254-6750 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS' Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Plaintiffs Failure To Comply With Court Order - Defendant's Motion for Terminating Sanctions is denied without prejudice. The plaintiff was ordered on December 7, 2015 to provide complete responses to Special Interrogatories and Document Request. In response she apparently served a verified response solely to Form Interrogatories. While the motion is unopposed, plaintiff shall be given one further opportunity to fully comply with the December 7, 2015 Order and to serve complete responses to all referenced discovery. Service is the response is required within 15 days of the hearing herein. If plaintiff fails to comply Defendant may refile its motion for terminating sanctions. Monetary sanctions are awarded to the defendant in the sum of $659 to be paid within 15 days of service of this Order( See Order for complete details). Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - BARBARA DOBARD, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. STACEY CHAU OF THE KRONBERG LAW, TEL. NO. 1-510-254-6750 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions - Motion to have Requests for Admissions and to recover monetary sanctions in the amount of $659 is granted and was unopposed. Sanctions shall be paid within 15 days of service of this Order with Notice of Entry. The Court's previous Order dated December 7, 2015 seeking the same relief provided plaintiff with 30 days to provide complete responses to the subject Requests for Admissions and she failed to do so. Said Order further advised the plaintiff failure to comply with the December 7,2015 Order would result in granting of the motion. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Written Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STACEY CHAU, ESQ. of Kronenberg Law APC, Tel No. 510-254-6750 appearing for Defendant MP Sports Club San Francisco LLC dba Sports Club/LA;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS CLUB/LA'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Written Discovery Responses, there has been no opposition filed to this motion; accordingly, the court sign the proposed order submitted requiring plaintiff to file without objection full and complete responses to the discovery sought within 30 days of the date of the order and to pay to defendant's counsel $500.00 within 10 days from the date of this order. Failure to comply with the discovery order within the time specified would entitle defendant to move for a dismissal with prejudice of the action. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Have Request For Admissions Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STACEY CHAU, ESQ. of Kronenberg Law APC, Tel No. 510-254-6750 appearing for Defendant MP Sports Club San Francisco LLC dba Sports Club/LA;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT MP SPORTS CLUB SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA SPORTS CLUB/LA'S Motion To Have Request For Admissions Deemed Admitted, no opposition has been filed to defendant's motion to have its requests for admission deemed admitted. Accordingly, the court issues an order compelling plaintiff to file without objection full and complete responses to defendant's request for admission within 30 days from the date of this order; failure to do so will result in an order deeming that all requests for admission are admitted. The court assesses no additional sanctions from those ordered regarding the motion to compel Plaintiff's written discovery responses. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
